channel.title: AI Tech Daily
channel.description: AI Tech Daily is your free daily AI news podcast — 5 minutes of the biggest artificial intelligence and tech news every morning. Stay ahead of AI, machine learning, ChatGPT, OpenAI, Google, and the tech industry. New episode every day, completely free.
channel.itunes:author: AI Tech Daily

item.title: AI News Jun 29 - Prompt injection exploiting enterprise AI
item.description: AI security vulnerabilities, OpenAI new models, and more top AI stories....

item.title: AI News Jun 29 - Cybercriminals exploiting enterprise AI weaknesses
item.description: Your daily briefing on the latest AI and technology news....

item.title: AI News Jun 29 — Prompt injection is exploiting enterprise AI's big
item.description: The dark side of AI adoption is starting to show its face, as businesses are learning the hard way that integrating large language models into their operations isn't as seamless as they thought. In the past two years, companies have been trying to fit these massive models into various aspects of their business, from support and analytics to development and internal automation. But as they're finding out, the disconnect between the assumed capabilities of these models and their actual characteris...
